# STRAT.001 ? The Art of War (Sun Tzu)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** military_strategic
**Domain:** MILITARY_STRATEGIC
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Know yourself and enemy; win without fighting; deception and positioning; adapt like water; terrain and timing; minimal force maximum effect

## Application
Understand all parties; position for advantage before action; indirect approach over direct; adapt to situation; timing crucial; economy of force

## Key Values
- Strategic positioning
- Deception
- Adaptation
- Economy of force
- Winning without battle

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, military_strategic

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
